response:
Section 1  
tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the future is uncertain but we are determined to save the company  

Section 2  
we are taking urgent action to stabilize our finances and secure our future - no one can stop us from continuing our mission  

Section 3  
every employee is critical to our success - your hard work is what will keep us going until the end  

Section 4  
we are not giving up - we are fighting for our company and our people - the battle is just beginning  

Section 5  
we will emerge stronger and more resilient - the road ahead is tough but we are ready to face it together
